data.body: Upgrade beads-backend.ts: buildTakePrompt() calls claimBeat() for queued+claimable beats and returns rich skill prompt. buildPollPrompt() calls listReady(), picks highest-priority claimable beat, claims it, returns prompt. Backward compat: non-claimable beats get simple prompt.
data.title: Phase 4: BeadsBackend buildTakePrompt and buildPollPrompt upgrades
